subcodes.first_line: O ancient friend! Thy gracious letter was received. Though some delay occurred in writing, this was due to [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای یار قدیم دستخط شریف وصول یافت اگر چند زمانی در تحریر تقصیر حاصل این بسبب
subcodes.subjects: @humility; meekness; lowliness, @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @review of publications, @acknowledgment of gift; of monetary contribution
